rounds.features: Puzzle mode (5 levels), 2 new enemy types (patrol + teleporter), 50 achievements (up from 40), Pause panel, Achievements panel, Power-ups HUD, Level transition panel, high score persistence (localStorage), neon arena border walls, enemy death particles, teleport effects, fuse spark animation, combo sound feedback, exit tiles for puzzle mode, enemy HP system, fastest/survival time tracking, save settings

features_completed: 5 enemy AI types: wander, chase, bomber, patrol, teleporter
6 power-up types: ExtraBomb, BlastRange, Speed, PassThrough, RemoteDetonate, Shield
4 game modes: Classic, Timed, Survival, Puzzle
5 puzzle levels with custom layouts and hints
Exit tile mechanic for puzzle mode
Combo scoring system with audio feedback
Particle effects: explosions, enemy death, teleport
8 PanelUI panels: HUD, Menu, Game Over, Settings, Pause, Achievements, Power-ups, Level Transition
Neon arena border walls with glowing posts
Timer warning colors for timed/puzzle modes
